description_long: This object is a light green, mummy-style sleeping bag with a tapered shape that is wider at the shoulders and narrows toward the feet. The exterior fabric appears to be a synthetic, slightly matte material, likely nylon or polyester, with visible stitching lines running horizontally along the body. The head end features a small, rounded opening, suggesting a hooded design, and the interior lining is a darker shade of gray. The sleeping bag is moderately puffy, indicating the presence of synthetic or down insulation inside. No visible brand logos, compression straps, or patch repairs are present on the surface.
description: A light green, mummy-shaped sleeping bag with a hooded opening and horizontal stitching, featuring a darker gray interior lining.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded, hooded opening and the slightly puffed, tapered body.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, horizontal stitching, and the gentle curve of the sleeping bag's profile.
description_view_2: Foot-end view highlighting the narrow, rounded end and the visible interior lining at the head opening.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same length and stitching details, with the hooded opening partially visible.
